cards.title: 500,000+ Happy Customers

body.text: {{product.brand}}

"I'm an ER nurse with plantar fasciitis who's worked through pregnancy, back surgery, and 20 years of 12-hour shifts. These ComfortWear hands-free shoes solved problems I didn't know had solutions.

No more bending in scrubs (impossible after my L4-L5 fusion). No more touching contaminated shoes. No more sitting in my car exhausted, dreading the shoe struggle. I just step in and the heel does the work. It's like magic every single time.

The arch support eliminated my morning plantar fasciitis hobble completely. I used to do that awful first-step shuffle to the bathroom, gripping the wall. Now I step out of bed into these shoes (yes, I keep a pair bedside) and walk normally. After 20 years of foot pain, I'd forgotten what that felt like.

My back hasn't caused any issues since switching. Think about it, we bend down for shoes at least 4 times per shift. Whether its to clean a spill, tighten your laces, switching out pairs, and thousands of unnecessary bends per year. My surgeon asked what I'd changed at my last follow-up because my posture improved. Shoes. It was the shoes.

They're genuinely slip-resistant (saved me during a code when someone knocked over irrigation), and they survive the wash with my scrubs. After particularly nasty shifts, I grab them by the clean inside collar, straight into the machine.

I rotate between 3 pairs because when you find shoes that give you back 10 minutes AND your dignity, you stock up. Black for work, grey for errands, white for home.

At $89, they cost less than one PT session, which I no longer need. Revolutionary for any nurse who's tired of the struggle, the pain, or asking for help."- Michelle, RN, MSN, Emergency
